name: moss
description: Read Moss spend management data: expenses (card transactions, invoices, reimbursements) with accounting detail, bank transactions, receipt files, and chart of accounts

envVars.name: MOSS_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Moss API Key ID (starts with kid_), created by an admin under Settings > Platform > API Keys

envVars.name: MOSS_CLIENT_SECRET
envVars.description: Moss API Secret Key (starts with sk_) paired with the Key ID

tools.name: List Expenses
tools.description: List expenses — card transactions, invoices, and reimbursements — with status, export status, and date filters; the basis for accounting exports

type.description: Filter by expense type: CARD_TRANSACTION, INVOICE, REIMBURSEMENT (repeatable)

status.description: Filter by expense status, e.g. SUBMITTED, APPROVED, REJECTED, VERIFIED, COMPLETED (repeatable)

export_status.description: Filter by accounting export status: NOT_EXPORTED, READY_FOR_EXPORT, EXPORT_PENDING, EXPORTED, EXPORT_FAILED (repeatable)

expense_date__gte.description: Expenses with expense date on or after this ISO 8601 date

expense_date__lte.description: Expenses with expense date on or before this ISO 8601 date

update_time__gte.description: Expenses last updated on or after this ISO 8601 timestamp (useful for incremental sync)

sort.description: Sort by field with direction, format [+|-]field_name, e.g. -expense_date

historicalSummary.omitted: expense line items, accounting dimensions, and export metadata

tools.name: Search Bank Transactions
tools.description: Search bank transactions of a Moss bank account within a booking-date window (read-only search query)

filters.description: Required filters: { "bankAccountId": "<uuid>", "bookingDateFrom": "YYYY-MM-DD", "bookingDateTo": "YYYY-MM-DD" } — all three fields are required

tools.name: List Bank Accounts
tools.description: List the company's bank accounts in Moss (use the IDs with Search Bank Transactions)

tools.name: Search Receipt Files
tools.description: Find receipt and invoice files attached to specific expenses (read-only search query); download via the returned file IDs

filters.description: Required filters: { "expenseIds": ["<uuid>", ...] } — up to 100 expense IDs

tools.name: List Expense Accounts
tools.description: List the chart of accounts used for ledger posting, for mapping expenses into your accounting system

sort.description: Sort by field with direction, format [+|-]field_name

tools.name: List Suppliers
tools.description: List supplier master data for spend-by-vendor analysis and accounting export enrichment

update_time__gte.description: Suppliers last updated on or after this ISO 8601 timestamp

sort.description: Sort by field with direction, format [+|-]field_name

tools.name: Get File Content
tools.description: Download the binary content of a receipt or invoice file (application/octet-stream) using a file ID from Search Receipt Files

fileId.description: File UUID from Search Receipt Files

tools.name: Get Bank Account Balance
tools.description: Get the current balance of a Moss bank account for liquidity overviews

bankAccountId.description: Bank account UUID from List Bank Accounts

tools.name: List Tax Rates
tools.description: List VAT/tax rate master data for mapping expenses into the accounting system

sort.description: Sort by field with direction, format [+|-]field_name (name, rate, or code)

prompts.title: Expenses ready for export
prompts.prompt: List Moss expenses with export status READY_FOR_EXPORT and summarize them by type and supplier.

prompts.title: Card spend overview
prompts.prompt: Show this month's Moss card transactions and break down spend by status.

prompts.title: Receipt check
prompts.prompt: For my most recent approved Moss expenses, check which ones have receipt files attached.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Moss setup

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: As a Moss admin, go to Settings > Platform > API Keys in the Moss app and create a key. You receive a Key ID (kid_...) and a Secret Key (sk_...). Only admins can create API keys.

steps.title: Set environment variables
steps.description: Set MOSS_CLIENT_ID to the Key ID and MOSS_CLIENT_SECRET to the Secret Key.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run List Bank Accounts or List Expenses. Access tokens are minted automatically via the OAuth2 client_credentials grant at https://public-api.getmoss.com/oauth2/token (valid for 1 hour, scope 'read').

notes: This connector requests the 'read' scope only; Moss write endpoints (creating suppliers, dimensions, or dimension items) require scope 'write' and are not included.
Rate limits: 180 read requests/minute and 20 write requests/minute per company.
The Search Bank Transactions and Search Receipt Files tools use POST search-query endpoints but are read-only.
